sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Covers the health/body lexicon (douleur aiguë/sourde, symptôme, ordonnance, soulager, guérir, se fouler la cheville), the consent-refusal idiom spectrum (carte blanche, à ta guise, je n'y tiens pas, hors de question, tu peux toujours courir) and the indicatif-vs-subjonctif referee call after certainty vs judgment expressions. Spirals from b1.2/unit-05-doubt-certainty. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 2 'Privé' ('De la tête aux pieds', p.28; 'Donner son avis' + 'Indicatif ou subjonctif ?', p.34). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
